subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who quickeneth the spirits through the flow of the spirit of forgiveness after their death through sin and rebellion, and Who illumineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا من یحیی الارواح بسریان روح الغفران بعد موتها بالذنب و العصیان و منور
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for forgiveness, @light and darkness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
